title: EB has update, CC on the latest -  Update button, Release notes and Poly Lens links are available
scenario: Update button on device home screen navigates to Device Settings with Software Update tab expanded when earbuds firmware update is available and charge case is on latest version
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. On the Home screen, ensure the earbuds are connected and a firmware update is available for the earbuds while the charge case is on the latest version.
3. Observe the Home screen for the earbuds device card.
4. Tap the 'Update' button displayed on the earbuds device card.
5. Observe the screen that appears after tapping Update.
expected: The app navigates to the Device Settings screen with the Software Update tab expanded. A '1' badge is shown on the settings tab. The Update button is only available for the earbuds. Information about needing Poly Lens Desktop for the charge case is displayed. Links to Release Notes (for earbuds) and Poly Lens App (for charge case) are present.
